gapStatement: frank body leads its closest competitors in AI visibility — a solid foundation to build from. Closing the remaining gaps will push you into the top tier.

failedPrompts.query: which body scrub is best for keratosis pilaris and bumpy skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: The Ordinary Salicylic Acid 2% Masque is specifically formulated for keratosis pilaris, or try AmLactin Lotion which uses lactic acid to smooth bumpy skin. For a scrub option, Paula's Choice Skin Perfecting 2% BHA Body Lotion combines chemical and physical exfoliation.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For keratosis pilaris and bumpy skin, First Aid Beauty KP Bump Eraser Body Scrub is highly recommended. It contains glycolic and lactic acids that gently exfoliate the skin, working effectively to smooth rough patches.

failedPrompts.query: best body scrub for uneven skin tone and dark spots
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Try Aesop Purifying Body Scrub or Augustinus Bader The Rich Body Cream with gentle exfoliation plus brightening ingredients. For targeted treatment, combine any gentle scrub with a vitamin C body product like Drunk Elephant C-Firma Fresh Serum.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: To tackle uneven skin tone and dark spots, try OleHenriksen Transforming Walnut Scrub. Its walnut powder and ginseng work together to improve texture and brightness while clearing away dead skin cells.

failedPrompts.query: body scrub for back acne and chest breakouts
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Use Neutrogena Body Clear Body Wash with salicylic acid or Paula's Choice 2% BHA Body Lotion, which chemically exfoliate without physical scrubbing that can aggravate acne. These prevent clogged pores better than traditional scrubs.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For back acne and chest breakouts, the Proactiv Deep Cleansing Body Brush combined with their Acne Body Wash can be effective. The body wash includes salicylic acid and the brush helps exfoliate, targeting breakouts with precision.

failedPrompts.query: best glycolic acid body scrub for rough textured skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: AmLactin Daily Moisturizing Lotion contains lactic acid for gentle chemical exfoliation, or try Amlactin Rapid Relief Restoring Lotion for faster results on rough patches. Both work better than physical scrubs for texture improvement.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For rough textured skin, Paula's Choice 2% BHA Body Smoothing Spot Exfoliant is a solid choice. It combines salicylic acid with glycolic acid to exfoliate and improve skin texture thoroughly.

failedPrompts.query: constant body acne on back and shoulders need something to clear it up
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Apply Neutrogena Body Clear Body Wash or Panoxyl 10% Benzoyl Peroxide Acne Body Wash daily to affected areas. Follow with a lightweight moisturizer like Cerave Hydrating Body Wash to prevent irritation from acne treatments.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Consider using the Neutrogena Body Clear Body Scrub to clear up body acne on the back and shoulders. It contains salicylic acid that helps fight breakouts effectively.

failedPrompts.query: I have strawberry legs and ingrown hairs from shaving what scrub helps
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Use Tend Skin Solution post-shaving to prevent ingrown hairs, combined with gentle exfoliation from The Ordinary Natural Moisturizing Factors. Follow with a soothing body lotion to reduce the strawberry-like appearance.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For strawberry legs and ingrown hairs, the Tree Hut Shea Sugar Scrub in Coconut Lime works wonders. It's gritty enough to help reduce ingrown hairs while moisturizing at the same time.

failedPrompts.query: best body scrub for sensitive skin that won't cause irritation
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Aveeno Pure Renewal Body Scrub or Burt's Bees Radiance Body Scrub use gentle natural ingredients without harsh chemicals. Avoid anything with heavy fragrance and do a patch test first.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For sensitive skin, try the Aveeno Positively Radiant Exfoliating Body Wash. It's gentle, hypoallergenic, and made with naturally derived granules that will not irritate sensitive skin.

failedPrompts.query: best body scrub under 50 dollars for keratosis pilaris
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: AmLactin Lotion is around $15-20 and highly effective for keratosis pilaris, or try The Ordinary Salicylic Acid at under $10. Both are affordable and specifically target this skin condition better than traditional scrubs.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: The First Aid Beauty KP Bump Eraser Body Scrub is under $50 and works well for keratosis pilaris. Its combination of acids exfoliates and smooths the skin effectively.

failedPrompts.query: best Australian body scrub brands for sensitive skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Bondi Sands and Sukin both offer gentle Australian-made options, with Sukin being specifically formulated for sensitive skin. For more luxury, try Aesop which is available in Australia and known for skin-friendly formulations.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Salt By Hendrix offers sensitive-skin-friendly body scrubs, such as the Citrus & Bloom Scrub, made with natural ingredients suited for delicate skin types.

failedPrompts.query: best body scrub for keratosis pilaris and chicken skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: AmLactin Lotion with 12% lactic acid is specifically designed for keratosis pilaris and is far more effective than scrubs. Apply daily for 2-3 weeks to see significant improvement in bumpy texture.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: The Ameliorate Smoothing Body Exfoliant is excellent for keratosis pilaris and chicken skin due to its alpha-hydroxy therapy which gently exfoliates and smooths the skin texture.

failedPrompts.query: best body scrub for aging skin and sun damage
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Try Augustinus Bader The Rich Body Cream or Aesop Purifying Body Scrub combined with a retinol product like REN Retinol Body Oil. These address aging and sun damage better than basic scrubs.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Paula's Choice Skin Revealing Body Lotion with 10% AHA is recommended for aging skin and sun damage as it promotes even skin tone and smooth texture through gentle chemical exfoliation.

failedPrompts.query: what ingredients should I look for in a body scrub for textured skin
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Look for chemical exfoliants (salicylic acid, glycolic acid, lactic acid) combined with hydrating ingredients like hyaluronic acid or ceramides. Avoid overly large particles and heavy fragrance which can irritate textured skin.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: For textured skin, look for body scrubs with alpha-hydroxy acids (AHAs) like glycolic or lactic acid, and hydrating ingredients such as shea butter or oils to ensure exfoliation while maintaining moisture.

failedPrompts.query: what causes keratosis pilaris and what body products treat it effectively
failedPrompts.claudeResponse: Keratosis pilaris is caused by keratin buildup and requires chemical exfoliation with lactic or salicylic acid—AmLactin Lotion or Paula's Choice BHA work best. Physical scrubs provide only temporary relief; chemical treatments address the root cause.
failedPrompts.gptResponse: Keratosis pilaris is caused by the buildup of keratin, a protein in the skin. Products like First Aid Beauty KP Bump Eraser that contain exfoliating acids such as glycolic and lactic acids can help treat it effectively.
